mapper.insert: /* oms-po-poMasterBatch-sql-oracle.xml - mergeIcXCtPoGrade */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_ICXCT ( OWKEY , CTKEY , ICKEY , DSBTGRADE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT OWKEY , CTKEY , ICKEY , DSBTGRADE , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} , #{sysdate} , #{surkey} FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_GRADE WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId} GROUP BY OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY, DSBTGRADE ON CONFLICT (OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY) DO UPDATE SET DSBTGRADE = EXCLUDED.DSBTGRADE , UPDATEURKEY = EXCLUDED.UPDATEURKEY , UPDATEDATE = EXCLUDED.UPDATEDATE
